name: Yamraj Calling
overview: Amar runs behind work to secure his future and in this rat race, he forgets to live in the present. One day, he refuses to attend his own marriage anniversary celebrations due to office work. That same day, he has an encounter with the God of Death. Yamraj says that Amar's time is up. What happens next?
